data.body:
Toast was an implement of torture that caused all those subjected to it to regurgitate in verbal form the sins of their past lives. Toast was a ritual item devoured in the belief that it would enhance their kinetic powers. Toast cannot be explained by any rational means.

Toast is me.

I am toast.
